tech_news.title: Samsung announces Galaxy Watch 9 and Ultra 2, with new AI features - Mashable
tech_news.description: Sorry, no Classic model this year.

tech_news.title: The fight for the future of foldable phones is here - NBC News
tech_news.description: Samsung has owned the market for foldable phones. Now Apple is getting in on it. NBC News chief tech analyst Joanna Stern breaks it down.

tech_news.title: Pixel Watch 5 specs leak with no chip upgrade, but more RAM - 9to5Google
tech_news.description: The Pixel Watch 5 is expected to look identical to last year's model, but the similarities might also extend to the specs and chip.

tech_news.title: Microsoft brings original Xbox backward compatibility to Windows PCs - Ars Technica
tech_news.description: First four compatible titles can be run with an 11-year-old graphics card.

tech_news.title: Steam wishlists are getting categories, making it even easier to organise all those games you'll definitely buy next sale - Rock Paper Shotgun
tech_news.description: Gifting games is a lot easier now too.

tech_news.title: iOS code could reportedly let Apple cut off apps when users miss iPhone payments - The Verge
tech_news.description: Code found in an iOS 27 beta would reportedly allow Apple to put financed devices in “Restricted Mode,” blocking access to nearly all apps.

tech_news.title: Pixel 11 series leaks in more official-looking images with new angles [Gallery] - 9to5Google
tech_news.description: Google’s Pixel 11 series has leaked pretty extensively at this point, but another new leak has just hit the web...

tech_news.title: Lenovo reveals more about its new lightweight Legion gaming handheld - Notebookcheck
tech_news.description: A fresh set of teasers for the Legion C700 has emerged, and through them, Lenovo has shared more details about the gaming handheld. It’s set to be lightweight and feature a thin chassis.

tech_news.title: Apple is reportedly testing a MacBook Neo with more RAM - The Verge
tech_news.description: The MacBook Neo may be getting an upgrade with a new processor, more memory, and new colors, but Apple will also likely raise the price.

tech_news.title: Samsung Says Smart Glasses Privacy Concerns Need Industrywide Fix - Bloomberg.com
tech_news.description: Samsung Electronics Co. showcased the smart glasses it developed in partnership with Alphabet Inc.’s Google, Warby Parker and Gentle Monster, offering new details around battery life and durability ahead of a release this fall.
